textByHash.7e20e62620aee35046cbf360a22b1eecb05927fa: Greetings friend. I am Rasolo, the famous merchant. Would you care to see my wares?
textByHash.e7fc8dde15493368329f481c83e198c9a0137305: Hmmmm? And what would that be?
textByHash.45bb3fed2764fa22b79631e4c7949521125c91a1: I know the object of which you speak. It is guarded by a fearsome warrior known as Damis, they say, who lives in the shadows, invisible to prying eyes...
textByHash.262c5403ce08edf98d912894ffd53e0361a94822: Well now... perhaps we can help each other out here.
textByHash.ea3d3d64815016157cad4c10041f34f5cfcab04e: I have in my possession a small trinket, a ring, that allows its wearer to see the unseen...
textByHash.62e394df744e9b5a841a1f7e95c20dbffd8b22e2: Ah, but it is not for sale... As such...
textByHash.4b31d7aa0e9fa0f4a792c8bc4e74390f457d6a83: I am offering to trade it for an item that was rightfully mine, but that was stolen by a bandit named Laheeb.
textByHash.2d165bfeb1359805f0eb91a9b43ce721d833f37e: The item is question is a gilded cross, that has some sentimental value to myself. I wish for you to recover this item for me, and I will happily let you have my ring of visibility.
textByHash.e8ff95c7abcecdf1d722865b9ac4321ca4e4aaa0: Well, as a travelling merchant I have roamed these lands for many years...
textByHash.8836f7079266f006269c02a49751c56b1b83fc51: To the far east of here there is an area that is dry and barren like the desert... it is called...
textByHash.59c0b2cec6ffa2fb5b882dbc5c637e1033e5980a: ...Yes, Al Kharid. Now to the south of Al Kharid there is a passageway, it is called the...
textByHash.bd1a1517cdb120b284dfc1aba79f0394caf31d55: ...Yes. I didn't realise you had travelled there yourself.
textByHash.4209d5498f946c6050a442bfedb87c95f0974a60: Anyway, when you have gone through the Shantay Pass, you will find yourself in a hostile desert... You will need to bring water with you to keep your life. Now, to the south-west of this pass, you will find a small
textByHash.19d15533b388aff8d60682d2c6f97947b68e68d3: If you know where Laheeb lives, why did you ask me?
textByHash.b68d4af007ed4eadc44d79fc44a51115c1743049: Well, okay then. Anyway, south of this encampment there is an area where few have ever been... It is a village of murderous bandits, and treacherous
textByHash.02d435bb44cb8ef9396ad653a812bfc526dc5288: thieves... This is where Laheeb makes his home.
textByHash.75a29d1ce356b109babc4cdaa1cdddf5347c1df3: He will have hidden his stolen treasure somewhere in that village, I am sure of it. When you find his loot, you will find my gilded cross. Return it to me, and I will reward you with my ring
textByHash.fb53914f8c3523723ac75e288ce59826cd8638b9: of visibility, so that you may find Damis. Does this seem fair to you?
textByHash.6954ac383d20c12adc095be17f05b168c565f207: I have already told you, he is of the shadows. You will see neither him nor his lair without the aid of magic.
textByHash.a4a63bd66e5c2e58f1011379ec319a2b7c0b62f3: Have you retrieved my gilded cross for me yet?
textByHash.51f2a138dc488ee73e5fec3a00828de1a3bf8774: Well what seems to be the problem?
textByHash.52b51240486ec09fe6b8c750f1341d2ab9985f2c: No, it is not for sale. Some things are more important than money, and the return of my gilded cross is one of them.
textByHash.944800fbd7e3a949a3369516b57e5a208f77bd55: You would be surprised to know just how close he is...
textByHash.2a465cba567afd6df75cd13f610c16b118f9bacb: As you wish. I will travel wherever the business takes me.
textByHash.9fc927c6d6340295e27ecce4f3f7b0d6b6cafc71: Many thanks for returning my heirloom to me, adventurer. Would you like to buy something?
textByHash.5fbf972ac6d6b5875a9932b3dcac0df189d482b5: Are you sure? I don't have it anymore...
textByHash.d4acbab1e1b50f1f3ffed779819eb91e580a2c0a: Well, should you need a replacement, I suggest you free up some inventory room first...
textByHash.d3c76686eb4e822625317a44955e662cdcb9bf89: Then by all means, take another. Only a foolish merchant would give away his only stock!
